appearances.activity: PM Takaichi's office posted the G7 Evian Summit Day 3 readout confirming her participation in an AI adoption working lunch and bilateral meetings; she separately acknowledged advancing food-tax reduction talks.

PM Takaichi concluded the G7 Evian Summit, confirmed all her proposals were adopted in the final communique, held a bilateral with Italian President Meloni, and issued statements on the US-Iran deal and Strait of Hormuz.
